title: Korbond 110356 6-inch Multi purpose Scissor, Black
features: MULTI-USE SCISSORS: Suitable for use when crafting or in the home, Korbond Multi-Purpose Scissors are a household staple
PRECISION BLADES: TheMulti-Purpose Scissors feature precision ground blades to ensure accurate cutting every time. Guaranteed to cut right to the tip of the blade
LIGHTWEIGHT: The overall lightweight design makes these shears comfortable to use for extended periods of time, and are suitable for both left and right-handed users
AMBIDEXTROUS: Korbond General Purpose Scissors are suitable for both left and right-handed use
With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s no. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
description: Product Description Sewing room basics from snipping threads to crafting a button hole, Korbond scissors use precision ground blades making sure the smoothest and most accurate cut is achieved every time. Left & right-handed Korbond 6 inch needlework scissors are ambidextrous, meaning Whichever hand is your dominant, you can always be sure of a comfortable grip. Safety Warning Take care when using. Not suitable for unsupervised children. Box Contains 1 x 7-inch Blades Manufacturer Contact Information Korbond, 2, Mallard Business Park, Trent Road, Grantham, Lincolnshire, NG31 7XQ, UK. See more
